name: color
description: Palette name or hex / `rgb(...)` / `r,g,b`. Exposes `--c` for descendants.

name: size
description: Density token shared across all items.

name: role
description: A11y mode. `'list'` static, `'menu'` action group, `'listbox'` selectable. Drives item role + keyboard nav.

name: selected
description: Selected value(s). Accepts `T` or `T[]`. Two-way bindable.

name: items
description: Items array — alternative to `children` snippet. Pair with `item` snippet.

name: item
description: Render function for an item from `items`.

name: label
description: Section label rendered inside the surface (small uppercase caption).

name: footer
description: Footer slot pinned below the surface.

name: empty
description: Empty-state body shown when `items` is empty.
